description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular barrel with a matte gray finish and a prominent black suppressor attached to the muzzle. The stock is solid and angular, with a black and red color scheme and a slight ergonomic curve for shoulder support. A scope is mounted on top of the receiver, providing enhanced aiming capabilities. The magazine is detachable and colored blue, positioned just in front of the trigger guard, and the grip is angled for comfortable handling. Ventilation holes are present along the barrel, likely for heat dissipation. Red accents are visible on the stock, muzzle, and other small components, giving the rifle a modern, tactical appearance.
description: A modern, matte gray rifle with a black suppressor, scope, blue detachable magazine, and red accents. The design is angular and tactical, with ergonomic features and ventilation holes.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle of the suppressor and a hint of the scope above.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the scope, blue magazine, angled grip, ventilation holes, and red-accented stock.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock's shape and red detailing, with the suppressor and scope aligned along the top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the scope, magazine, grip, and the full length of the suppressor and stock.
